bird.name: Blue-faced rail
bird.summary: The blue-faced rail (Gymnocrex rosenbergii) also bald-faced rail or Schlegel's rail, is a species of bird in the family Rallidae. It is end…

relations.subject: Blue-faced rail
relations.evidence: It has been evaluated as a threatened species since October 1, 2016, by the IUCN Red List due to habitat loss and pollution. By 2000, the estimated population of the blue-faced rail was in the low 2000's to the high 9000's, however it has steadily declined since then
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。
